content:
if aequor is the realm most tied to dreams, then i wonder if, metaphorically, thats why majority of the lemuria-aligned awakeners are also aequor

lemuria itself is a bygone dream, a fallen civilization that its followers want to revive

then again im not the most media literate lol
nah that makes a lot of sense, but unfortunately they're also all ocean themed so that aspect kinda gets lost
an aequor awakener who's purely dream themed would be cool...
then again in design all the aequor awakeners are all pretty closely tied to the sea now
so maybe it'd be better just to make a new realm or something
yeah...
work for the ~~american~~ lemurian dream

Chaos is a realm that might have traits of other realms but they’re still their own things
Like how Nymphaea has the sea motif but not an Aequor bc she doesn’t have Lemuria connection

and we already knew Chaos description
the whole “all are welcome but none can leave”

maybe you haven’t realized this
but dream and ocean together makes sense 
bc Cthulhu is dead dreaming in the abyss
and if you look closely everyone in Aequor actually has dream motif
oh i know
but i mean its less obvious/much more subtle
I think you’re focusing too much on the sea aspect when even with Corpo she still has dream aspect

and besides 
only Wanda has the dream motif in Ultra for now
(and that dream is her Ultra space so it’s different)

it’s in the name
Aequor literally means from the ocean
i mean the dream aspect is subtle
so of course the ocean must be more prominent
like tulu brings it up a lot
but for the rest you have to dig deeper
that’s the fun of character reading

I don’t think they have to make it obvious to fit with all the old descriptions they have written 
and fyi there are a lot of contradictions everywhere in the game that still haven’t been fixed
like how the descriptions of some awakeners in the archive don’t actually match with what they showed us…
oh i'm not saying they have to
i just think it'd be neat if we had an aequor awakener that leans more into dreams than ocean
in the same way some caro characters are more consumption (uvhash) whereas others are more body modding (helot)
just more design variety

as you can see
Aequor means from the ocean 
everyone has Lemuria connections 
and hidden dream aspects 
so even if they release a dreamy Aequor it will be some kind of seafood but with different colors to match
there are not really a Lemurian thing without it being seafood <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
is aurita connected lemuria?
yes
celeste certainly isn't
the city she said about is Lemuria
she actually descendant of Lemurian people
where is this said...

should be in one of the event texts…
I should have screenshotted it
ah nvm its her wheel
aequor trapped in tulu jail forever
it will be like that sometimes
honestly I first thought Aurita won’t have anything to do with Lemuria
then I realized the dream she has about that city is just Lemuria

just another Sanga moment but she’s too innocent to understand it
probably Chaos
bc Bokrug doesn’t have anything to do with Lemuria

and Bokrug lives in a lake
not the ocean
this is lake racism
